goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should go to 'ely' and should 'arrive by 17:45'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'mutliple sports' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of architecture'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
The train should go to ely and should arrive by 17:45
Make sure you get price and travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of mutliple sports and should be in the centre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of architecture
